prestazioni: Engine swap to a **M110.986** (3.5L inline-6, 200+ HP) with a **Bosch K-Jetronic mechanical fuel injection** conversion, retaining the original throttle-body injection style but upgraded with **Mahle forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Schrick 284° camshafts**, and a **custom 3.5L crankshaft** for increased stroke (86.4mm) and displacement. Paired with a **Getrag 280/5 5-speed manual transmission** (from the W123 280CE) with a **Peloquin limited-slip differential (40% lock)** for improved power delivery.

Forced induction via a **Garrett T25 turbocharger (0.63 A/R, .48 trim)** with a **custom air-to-water intercooler** (mounted in the original radiator support) and a **Turbonetics wastegate (10 psi spring)**. Supporting mods include a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** with **Bosal 4-2-1 headers** and a **Supersprint rear muffler (2.5-inch outlets)** for backpressure optimization. Fueling is handled by a **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump** and **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors** with a **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** for precise tuning.

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (8-position adjustable damping)** and **Eibach Pro-Kit springs (-30mm drop)**. Polyurethane bushings from **Powerflex (black series)** replace all factory rubber, while the rear subframe is reinforced with **custom 4mm steel plates** to handle increased torque. Braking is upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors front, 300mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 Pagoda-specific widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with **custom 3M matte silver wrap** and **OEM-style chrome accents** on the grille and trim. The kit is modified to retain the original **Pagoda hardtop** with a **custom carbon fiber roof panel** (from **Seibon**) to reduce weight.

Custom **HRE FF01 wheels (16x8 ET20 front, 16x9 ET25 rear)** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (205/50/16 front, 225/50/16 rear)** for period-correct stance. Wheel arches are rolled and pulled for clearance, with **custom fender flares** integrated into the Rocket Bunny kit. The original **chrome bumpers** are retained but **dechromed and powder-coated in satin black** for a stealth look.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD bucket seats (retrimmed in black Nappa leather with red stitching)** and a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede)** on a **NRG quick-release hub**. The dashboard is refinished in **original wood veneer (walnut)**, while the center console is replaced with a **custom aluminum panel** housing a **Motec C127 dash display** and **Alpine iLX-F309 infotainment system**. The original **Becker Europa radio** is restored and retained as a functional piece.
